\tzpentry{ID4159}{Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4159 introduces Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{M} = T^*(SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3) \otimes \mathfrak{u}(1)_{gauge} \end{equation}
